slider.heading: Instant, lightweight H5P-Course hosting
slider.subheading: The easiest way to make your learning content available to your students
slider.subheading1: Create and share interactive H5P courses directly from your device
slider.subheading2: Students can access engaging content anytime, anywhere, even offline
slider.subheading3: Track progress and results with comprehensive analytics and sync

success.check_email: Check your email for the verification link.

info.signup_text: Register with your email address. You will receive a verification link to activate your account. This link is required to access the platform. After this come back to the app.
info.login_text: Sign in with your email and password to access your courses and learning materials.

toast.registration_sent: Registration link sent to your email.

info.title: Reset Your Password
info.text: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password. Check your email and follow the instructions to create a new password.

toast.success: Password reset link sent to your email.

info.instructions: To add a new course for your students; simply enter the course name and a download link to your H5P file below or upload a file.
info.student_ready: You are all set to view and join available courses. Click the button below to get started!

alert.name_missing_msg: Please enter a name for your course.
alert.link_needed_msg: Please provide a valid download link.
alert.invalid_link_msg: The download link provided is not a valid URL.
alert.download_failed_msg: Could not download the course. Please check the link and try again.

empty.no_courses_teacher: No courses available. Please contact your teacher.
empty.no_courses_student: No courses available. Please contact your teacher.

empty.no_results: No results yet. Try completing a course to see your results here.

download.title: Download course
download.body: Download this course to access the units.

alert.delete_msg: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete the course "{{course_name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
alert.clear_local_msg: Remove downloaded content for "{{course_name}}" from this device? You can download it again later.
alert.download_missing_msg: No download link is available for this course.
alert.download_failed_msg: Could not download the course. Please try again.

toast.saved_offline: Results saved locally and will be uploaded later.
toast.saved_success: Your points have been saved successfully.

empty.no_units: No units found for this course.

alert.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
alert.duplicate_email: This email is already in the list.
alert.remove_failed: Failed to remove user from server.
alert.sharing_failed: Failed to share invitation link. Please try again.

toast.share: Check out the course in remote Stury app

file_upload.title: Upload File
file_upload.info: Pick a file from your device. You cannot upload the same filename twice. Once the upload is done and checked; the download link will show up automatically below.
file_upload.placeholder_uri: Local file URI (e.g. file:///... or content://...)

alert.uri_msg: Please paste a local file URI (or use a picker) to upload.
alert.failed_msg: Could not upload file. Try again.
alert.pick_msg: Could not pick file. Try again.

delete_account.title: Delete Account
delete_account.warning: This action cannot be undone. Your account and all associated data will be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm.

alert.delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.

results_table.empty_sections: No sections in the last breakdown entry.

course.toast_msg: This course is currently {status}. Only teachers can change the status.

export.missing_id: Course ID is missing for export.
export.conversion_failed: Failed to convert data to CSV.
export.sharing_unavailable: Sharing is not available on this device.
export.export_failed: Failed to export CSV. Please try again.
